title: Sentinel Shield tool-provenance audit report
description: Machine report emitted by scripts/audits/tool-provenance-audit.sh. Records how each scanner tool is actually resolved for execution — a binary found on PATH, or a configured Docker image — with resolved version / path / digest / platform. For binaries it computes the SHA-256 of the PATH-resolved executable and verifies it against a declared expected checksum. For container images it records the configured reference and, where resolvable, the immutable @sha256 digest. A non-empty 'violations' array (a checksum mismatch, or an unverified image digest under --require-image-digest) means the gate failed closed.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the audit run.

platform.description: Host platform the audit ran on, "<os>/<arch>".

status.description: pass = zero violations; fail = one or more.

checked.description: Number of tool acquisition specs inspected.

violations.description: One object per detected provenance failure. Empty when status=pass.

check.description: checksum-mismatch = PATH-resolved binary's SHA-256 != declared expected; image-digest-unverified = a configured image resolved to no immutable @sha256 digest while --require-image-digest was set (fail closed).

records.description: One provenance record per inspected tool (see isolated_tool_provenance_record).

docker_probe_timeouts.description: Count of BOUNDED `docker inspect` image-digest probes that TIMED OUT (a wedged/unreachable Docker daemon). Optional; present since report version 1.1.

docker_probes.description: One bounded-command-result (schemas/bounded-command-result.schema.json) per BOUNDED docker probe performed while resolving image digests. A timed-out probe surfaces here as status="timed-out" so a hung daemon is visible in the machine report instead of hiding behind a silently-empty digest. Optional; present since report version 1.1.

source.description: How the tool was resolved for execution. local-binary = found on PATH; docker-image = a configured image reference; unresolved = neither a binary on PATH nor an image was found.

binary.description: Present when a binary was resolved from PATH.

path.description: Absolute path of the PATH-resolved executable (command -v).

sha256.description: Computed SHA-256 of the PATH-resolved executable.

checksum_verified.description: true=verified match, false=mismatch, null=no expected checksum declared.

image.description: Present when a Docker image was configured (source=docker-image).

configured_reference.description: The SENTINEL_SHIELD_<T>_IMAGE reference as configured (repo:tag or repo@sha256:...).

resolved_digest.description: The immutable image digest (sha256:...) resolved from an @sha256 pin or `docker inspect` RepoDigests, if any.

verification_status.description: verified = an immutable digest was resolved; unverified = mutable-only provenance (no cryptographic proof).

vulnerability_db.description: Vulnerability database provenance for DB-backed scanners.

timestamp.description: Vulnerability DB build/update timestamp, if known.
